classification: UI — Tier-3 (additive frontend + read-only GET routes, no money movement, no schema, behind OFF flag)
task: RECON-02 UI tabs: extend the FIN-23 surface at /accounting/qbo-reconcile with Runs + Exceptions tabs (ParityTable grammar), run dashboard (complete/open/late + owner), side-by-side TMS|QBO value cells, one-click source drill-down (McLeod rule) + qbo_ref display, and resolve/explain actions (resolution_note required on resolve; maker≠checker enforced in API). Renders data RECON-01 produces. Additive only; §7 palette; ES/EN keys. Behind flag TMS_QBO_RECON_ENABLED.
details: Tier-3 non-financial: ships NO migration and touches NO accounting.* schema or money path → self-mergeable on green per the standing auto-merge rule. If any change touches a migration or accounting.* schema it becomes financial and re-gates to Jorge.

New files (block signature): apps/frontend/src/pages/accounting/recon/ReconRunsTab.tsx + ReconExceptionsTab.tsx. These are ADDITIVELY mounted into the existing QboReconcileCapturesPage.tsx (extends_existing) — no existing tab/column/module removed or reordered (constitution §7).

Also extends (already on main): apps/frontend/src/pages/accounting/QboReconcileCapturesPage.tsx (mount tabs), apps/frontend/src/api/accounting.ts (read methods), apps/frontend/src/i18n/en.json + es.json (ES/EN keys).

§7 palette: --navy #1f2a44, --navy-dk #0f1729, --slate/--slate-lt, --bg #f8fafc; --red #dc2626 for elevated/high severity only; no purple/blue/pink; no emojis. Module header keeps ← back-arrow + breadcrumb.
Guards: verify:arch-design green (locked-UI surface untouched), verify:nav-integrity, verify:no-internal-language-in-prod-ui, responsive audit new_vs_baseline=0.
Depends on RECON-01 (read routes + data). Renders only when TMS_QBO_RECON_ENABLED is ON; OFF today → app unchanged.
